title: Nautileye
description: Updates the texture of the conduit and conduit particles to be more in line with Minecraft's current style!
body:
Have you ever thought that the conduit texture is kinda boring and doesn't match with Minecraft's current textures? This resourcepack fixes that!
<details>
<summary> Texture Updates</summary>


-  Conduit block, 
-  Conduit power, 
-  Conduit particles
    - The particles are based after the current bedrock particles and the old java ones

</details>



<details>
<summary>Other Info</summary>

I think this resourcepack will work for any version but I am not sure

</details>
